<div align="center">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="340"/>
</div>

<table align="center">
<tr>
<td>

Hi, I'm **Alok Sharma** — a CSE (Data Science) undergrad at **NIET Greater Noida**, currently building **[Ythaen](https://ythaen.tech)** and exploring the space where cloud, data, and AI agents meet.

I'm a recognized **Google Cloud Innovator**, spending most of my time experimenting with multi-agent AI systems, cloud platforms, and turning messy data into things people can actually use — and occasionally, into things beginners can actually *understand*.

- 🔭 Currently building **Ythaen** — [ythaen.tech](https://ythaen.tech)
- ☁️ Actively exploring **AI Agents, Google ADK, Gemini & Vertex AI**
- 📊 Comfortable turning raw data into dashboards, stories, and decisions
- 🌱 Always learning — most recently, Oracle Cloud & multi-agent protocols
- ✉️ Reach me at **AS.AlokSharma@outlook.com**

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<br/>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="340"/>
</div>

<div align="center">

<a href="https://ythaen.tech">

<br/><br/>

<table>
<tr><td width="600">

A project in active development — built quietly, shipped gradually. I'm not sharing every detail yet, but you can follow along at **[ythaen.tech](https://ythaen.tech)** as it takes shape.

</td></tr>
</table>

</div>

<br/>

<div align="center">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="300"/>
</div>

<table align="center" width="100%">
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

**🧠 Curiosity Corner**
<br/>
<sub>HTML5 &middot; CSS3 &middot; JS &middot; PHP &middot; MySQL</sub>

A full-stack educational site that turns jargon-heavy Science, Tech & Space topics into explanations a curious beginner — or a kid — can actually follow. Built with dual-layer validation, live search filtering, and a PHP + MySQL backend with zero frontend dependencies.

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

**🤖 Multi-Agent AI Systems**
<br/>
<sub>Google ADK &middot; Gemini &middot; A2A Protocol &middot; Vertex AI</sub>

Stateful multi-agent systems built during Google's AI Agents Intensive — agent-to-agent collaboration via the A2A Protocol, deployed on Vertex AI Agent Engine with full observability (logs, traces, metrics).

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

**📊 Tableau Projects**
<br/>
<sub>Data Visualization &middot; Storytelling</sub>

A growing set of dashboards focused on turning raw datasets into visuals that actually explain something — not just decorate a number.

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

**🛰️ National Space Hackathon 2025**
<br/>
<sub>IIT Delhi &middot; via Unstop</sub>

Built a Cargo Stowage Management System concept for the ISS with an AI + API-integrated approach, as part of a four-member team.

</td>
</tr>
</table>
